MlNJS1RY OF DEFENCE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, t he 4t h November, 20 II S .R O. 10 (E).- Wh ereas, dra ft Election of Vice-Pr es ident of th e Canton ments Board (Procedure) Rul es, 201 0 we re pub li shed, as req uir ed by section 31 read with sub- sect io n (3) of the sect io n 19 of th e Canto nm e nt s Ac t, 2006 (4 1 of2006) in Part-li, section 4 of the Gaze tt e of Ind ia, vide notifica ti on of th e Gove rnm ent of In dia, Minist ry of Defence, S.R.O 12 (E) dat ed th e 23n1 August, 2010 in viting objections and sugges ti ons fro m all pe rsons li ke ly to be affected th ereby, before th e expiry of the pe rio d of sixty days from t he date on wh ic h th e co pi es of the sa id Gaze tte not ifi cation arc made avai lable to U1 e pub li c; And, whereas, th e copies of th e sa id Gaze tt e were made available to the pub Iic by 3151 Oct, 20 10 by the Ca nt onme nt Boa rd s; And, whereas, all the o bj ec tio ns an d ·s u gges t io ns received befo re the date so specified have been d ul y considered by the Ce ntral Government; Now, th erefore, in exercise of powers co n fe rred by section 31 read with sub- sec tio n (3) oCsec ti on 19 of the sa id Act, th e Ce ntral Gove rn ment hereby makes the following ru les, na mely:- ELE CTION OF VICE -PRE SIDENT OF THE CA NT O NME NTS BOARD (PROCEDURE) R ULES, 2011 PART-I PRELIMINARY 1. . Short title and commcncerncnt. - ( 1) These rules may be ca ll ed th e Election of Vice- Pr es id e nt of th e Cantonm ent s Board (Pro ce dure) R ul es, 20 11. (2) They sha ll come in to fo rce on the date of their final publ ication in the Offi cial Gazette. 2. Definitions. - (1) In th ese rules, unl ess th e co ntext o th erwise requires.- ( a) "Act" means the Ca nt onments Act, 2006 (41 of 2006); (c) "For m" means a form app e nd ed to th ese rul es; · (d) "Member" means th e me mb er eiec ted to Ihc Board; (e) "·P res id ent" means th e Pres id ent of th e Boa rd ; and -- 8 of 13 -- ['~-' 11-~ 4] (f) "V ice -Pres id en t" means the Vice-President o[ the Board; (2) . 'J'he words and expressions used in these rul es and not defined but deiincd in the Act shall have respective mea nin gs as ass ign ed to them in the Act. J. Power of J>rc sidcnt. - Subject to the general su perintendence, direction and con tr ol of the Central Government, th e President shall be responsible i"or th e conduct of election of the Vice-President. PART-II ELECTION OF VICE-PRESIDENT OF THE BOARD :.\. Co nvening Special Meeting for elec t io n of Vicc- P• ·cs idc nt. - (l) A speci~l meeting of the Board shall be convened in th e ofJice of the Bomd for the election or Vice-President. (2) The ChiefExecutivc Officer shall give notice of the date and time of such special meeting in Form-l at least four cicar working days in advance from the date of the meeting Gxed by the President for the election or the Vice- President. 5. Mmme r of election.- (1) A can didate for the office of Vice-Preside nt sha ll be pruposed by one member and seconded by another member by way of nomination paper 111 Form-ll. (2) The names of all ca nd idates val idl y proposed a nd seconded by th e mt:mbc r shnll be read out by the President in special meet in g of th e Boru·d. (3) If only one candidate is duly proposed and seconded, there shall be no election and such carul idate shall be declared elected as Vice-President. (4) If there arc two or more candidates, th e elected members of the Board s hall then proceed to vote by ballot. The ballot shall be held in such manner as the President may direct. (5) The Pn.:sidcnt shall ,- (a) record the total number of votes polled by ballot. (b) announce the number of votes secured by. each candidate: and (c) declare the candidate who secures t he highest number of votes and eiected. (6) In the event of eq uality of votes between two or more cancliclatcs. the 1)resident shall draw lots in th e presence of the members and th e ca ndi dates and whose name is lirst drawn sha ll be declared to have been duly elected. 9. -- 9 of 13 -- I 0 nm GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY lPAnT II-SEC . 4] 6. Record of proceedings. - ( 1) lmmediately after the declaration of the re su lt of the election, the President s hall- (a) prepare a record of the proceeding of the meeting and sign it with his initials in every cotTection, if any, made therein; · (b) publish the result of the ~lection of Vice-President on the notice board of the Board in Forrn-lii stating the name of the person elected as Vice-President of the Board in Form-Ill and send a copy of the result to the General Officer Commanding-in-Chief, the Command and Director General Defence Estates; (c) give the copy of the result to the candidate who declared elec ted as Vice- President; and (d) issue a certificate of election in Form-lV. (2) the record of proceeding of the meeting prepared by the President w1der clause (a) of sub-rule (1 ), shall be attested by a majority of the members who participated in the meeting and the Chief Executive Officer sha ll countersign on such reeord of proceedings.
